adpClientId.title: ADP Client ID
adpClientId.description: OAuth client_id from ADP Marketplace (Luminary Life). Stored at the actor level as a default; n8n overrides per-run is unnecessary.

adpCertPem.title: ADP Client Certificate (PEM)
adpCertPem.description: Full contents of adp.cert.pem (the public client certificate). Begins with -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----.

adpKeyPem.title: ADP Client Private Key (PEM)
adpKeyPem.description: Full contents of adp.key.pem (the private key paired with the certificate). Begins with -----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY----- or -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----.

linkedOids.title: Already-linked associateOIDs
linkedOids.description: ROLI agents that already have adp_associate_oid set. The actor fetches detail for these specifically so we always get fresh status/title/email even if they're outside the first 100-worker page.

salesTitleKeywords.title: Job title keywords that mark a 'sales' worker
salesTitleKeywords.description: Lowercased substrings; if any matches the worker's jobTitle/jobCode.shortName, the worker is flagged as a candidate sales hire (so n8n can Slack you when an unlinked sales worker appears).

companyCodeAllowlist.title: Company code allowlist
companyCodeAllowlist.description: ADP company codes (3-letter prefix of positionID) to include. Defaults to ['XAJ'] (Digital Senior Benefits). Brokerage and other tenants under the same client credentials are filtered out. Already-linked ROLI agents bypass this filter so terminations always propagate. Empty array disables filtering.

tokenUrl.title: ADP Token URL
tokenUrl.description: OAuth token endpoint. Override only if ADP changes the URL.

apiBase.title: ADP API Base URL
apiBase.description: Base URL for ADP REST endpoints. Override only for sandbox testing.

pageSize.title: Workers list page size
pageSize.description: Page size for the /hr/v2/workers list call. ADP supports up to 1000.

requestDelayMs.title: Inter-request delay (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Pause between API requests to stay under ADP's ~100 RPM rate limit.
